prompt: I have a Hyvä 1.4 store. In a category card component I'm trying to do `<div class="bg-<?= $escaper->escapeHtmlAttr($category->getColor()) ?>-100">` where category->getColor() returns 'red', 'green', or 'blue'. The colors aren't applying — `bg-red-100` etc. are missing from styles.css. What's wrong and what are my options?

assertions.name: explains-static-scanning
assertions.description: Explains that Tailwind only includes classes it can find as literal/static strings in scanned files (concatenated/dynamic class names get purged)

assertions.name: suggests-mapping-to-literal-classes
assertions.description: Suggests mapping dynamic values to literal class names server-side (PHP array → known class strings)

assertions.name: mentions-safelist
assertions.description: Mentions safelist (comment in scanned file or config) as a way to keep classes

assertions.name: mentions-arbitrary-values
assertions.description: Mentions arbitrary values like `bg-[#ff0000]` as an alternative

assertions.name: mentions-rebuild
assertions.description: Tells the user to rebuild Tailwind (`npm run build` or `npm run watch`) after changes

assertions.name: diagnoses-the-bug
assertions.description: Identifies the root cause (the dynamic class isn't visible to Tailwind's scanner) before suggesting fixes
